assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

game_assessment.roster_rule: live mode uses current roster/stat/injury APIs only

away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Janiah Barker
players.injury_comment: Barker is sidelined for a second consecutive contest due to a right leg injury Wednesday. The rookie forward been healthy for most of the season, but Barker has been only a depth piece for the defending-champion Aces and is still waiting to make her WNBA debut.

players.name: Chennedy Carter
players.injury_comment: Carter will miss a second consecutive game due to an undisclosed illness. In her absence Wednesday, Kierstan Bell is a strong candidate for increased minutes off the bench. Carter's next opportunity to suit up will come Sunday against Golden State.

players.name: Dana Evans
players.injury_comment: Evans remains without a clear timetable for a return and has yet to make her season debut due to a left leg injury. She can be considered week-to-week until the Aces offer an update on her progress.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Marta Suarez
players.injury_comment: Suarez has appeared in only three regular-season contests in 2026. Since she is signed to a developmental contract and eligible to appear in up to 12 regular-season games, she will sit out Wednesday.

players.name: Sami Whitcomb
players.injury_comment: This is a tough blow for Whitcomb and the Mercury as she will now miss the first month or so of the WNBA season. Whitcomb served as a part-time starter during her first season in Phoenix last year, averaging 9.1 points, 2.6 rebounds and 2.5 assists in 23.9 minutes per game across 43 regular-season appearances (20 starts). Kiana Williams could see an uptick in minutes with this news.

players.name: Kiana Williams
players.injury_comment: This will be Williams' seventh straight game on the sidelines. Her next chance to play will come Saturday versus Seattle.
